name: KC Legacy Booking
description: KC Legacy Booking is a mobile booking app for car valeting and detailing services. Customers can schedule appointments in seconds straight from their phone, view available packages and pricing upfront, browse a photo gallery of previous work, and track their booking status. The app also includes an admin side for KC Legacy staff to manage bookings, calendar, and customer responses. Works on both Android and iOS.
features: Mobile-optimised booking — schedule your valeting appointment anytime, anywhere
Instant booking confirmation with reference tracking
View available packages and pricing upfront
Photo gallery of previous work so you know what to expect
Admin app for KC Legacy staff to manage bookings, calendar, and customer responses
target_audience: Car owners looking for convenient valeting and detailing booking, and KC Legacy staff managing appointments

name: UK News Now
description: UK News Now is far more than a news app. Behind its clean, easy-to-read news interface lies a powerful covert evidence gathering tool designed to protect and support those in vulnerable situations. Users can browse UK & world headlines with breaking news alerts whilst silently capturing, logging, and securing evidence in the background. Features include an AI companion trained in domestic & narcissistic abuse support, timestamped and geotagged journal entries for legally admissible evidence, silent recording and silent photo capture whilst browsing the news page, and a secure encrypted vault backup stored on a remote server. The app appears as a standard news reader whilst silently working to protect its users.
features: Curated UK & world headlines with breaking news alerts
Covert evidence gathering with AI companion trained in domestic & narcissistic abuse support
Timestamped, geotagged journal entries for legally admissible evidence
Silent recording & silent photo capture whilst browsing the news page — completely undetectable
Secure encrypted vault backup stored on a remote server
target_audience: Individuals in vulnerable domestic situations who need to gather evidence discreetly, whilst also wanting to stay informed about UK & world news

name: MindScape
description: MindScape is a next-generation wellness companion designed to help users ease anxiety, support better sleep, and promote emotional balance through a unique blend of sensory therapy and guided exercises. Features include calming light therapy sessions tailored to your mood, soothing sound tones and frequencies for relaxation and focus, guided breathing exercises to reduce stress and anxiety, sleep and relaxation modes to help you wind down and rest better, and daily wellness check-ins to track your emotional wellbeing over time. Whether dealing with anxiety, struggling to sleep, or just needing a moment of calm, MindScape provides a discreet, accessible tool right in your pocket.
features: Calming light therapy sessions tailored to your mood
Soothing sound tones & frequencies for relaxation and focus
Guided breathing exercises to reduce stress and anxiety
Sleep & relaxation modes to help you wind down and rest better
Daily wellness check-ins to track your emotional wellbeing over time
target_audience: Individuals seeking mental wellness, stress relief, and better sleep through guided meditation and mindfulness exercises

name: Kalo
description: Kalo is an all-in-one nutrition and wellness app that goes beyond simple calorie tracking. With micronutrient tracking (11+ vitamins and minerals), monthly meal plan generators with 4-week calorie-targeted plans, recipe search with diet and health filters, a Cupboard Cooker that suggests recipes based on what you already have, cycle tracking integrated with nutrition, and auto-generated shopping lists — Kalo combines everything you need to eat well and stay healthy in one beautiful app.
features: Calorie & macro tracking with micronutrient tracking (11+ vitamins and minerals)
Monthly meal plan generator with 4-week calorie-targeted plans
Recipe search with diet and health filters
Cupboard Cooker — suggests recipes based on what you already have in your cupboard
Cycle tracking integrated with nutrition and cycle-aware nutrition guidance
Auto-generated shopping lists from your meal plan
target_audience: Health-conscious individuals wanting comprehensive nutrition tracking, meal planning, and wellness features in one app
